summary.en: US online used-car retailer that disrupted the dealership model with a fully online buying flow, no-haggle pricing, 7-day return, and the iconic glass car-vending-machine pickup tower. Nearly went bankrupt in 2022 after a high-leverage ADESA acquisition collided with a used-car downturn; restructured debt in 2023 and returned to record gross profit per unit in 2024.
summary.zh: 美国在线二手车零售商。用全在线购车流程 + 无议价定价 + 7 天无理由退货 + 标志性的「玻璃汽车自动售货机」提车塔颠覆了传统经销商模式。2022 年因高杠杆收购 ADESA 撞上二手车需求下行濒临破产,2023 年靠债务重组、2024 年靠单车毛利创历史新高重新站起来。

sources.label: WSJ · Carvana Was Headed for Bankruptcy. How It Got to Record Profit (2024-05)
